---
title: "City streets"
output:
  ioslides_presentation:
    theme: flatly
    widescreen: true
author: "Alexandre Masselot"
date: "2026-02-27"
---
```{r package_setup, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# https://chatgpt.com/c/699f73a9-eb58-8337-9f49-6b0525b21ff7
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

if (requireNamespace("rstudioapi", quietly = TRUE) && rstudioapi::isAvailable()) {
  # Interactive in RStudio: use the current editor document path
  rmd_path <- rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path
} else {
  # When knitting/rendering: knitr knows the input
  rmd_path <- knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)
}
if (!is.null(rmd_path) && nzchar(rmd_path)) {
  knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = dirname(normalizePath(rmd_path)))
  setwd(dirname(normalizePath(rmd_path)))
}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 12,   # increase width
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width = "100%"   # VERY IMPORTANT
)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

```
```{r loading_data}
```
